LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-29-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER SHERRI OMDAHL, KRISTOPHER WATTS'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearingon Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. GABRIEL LEE-SANCHEZ, Esq. of Keesal, Young & Logan (tel: 415-398-6000) for Petitioner.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER SHERRI OMDAHL, KRISTOPHER WATTS's Notice Of Hearing on Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Matter not argued/contested. Counsel Lee-Sanchez provides the Court with a proposed order and proposed judgment in open court. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioners' unopposed petition to Confirm Arbitration Award is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)
